text: The sterile quiet of the hallway before the glass is a liminal space; anticipation hums in the hum of the lights. Stepping into the vivid, thought-provoking display of "R+D," I feel curiosity awaken—a sense that knowledge is alive and ever-changing. Here, the boundaries between observer, participant, and idea blur. I feel inquisitive, drawn into the interplay of innovation and interpretation, aware of the privilege and responsibility that comes with inquiry.
